name: antecedent_trap_monday_hubspot
description: Acceptance fixture #1 from EvidenceClaim plan. The phrase 'did not provide a good UI for non-sales users' is in a Monday.com review but attributes to HubSpot (the prior vendor). subject=alternative on the source phrase. A pain_claim_about_vendor for Monday must reject this witness with rejection_reason='antecedent_trap'.

review.summary: Switched from HubSpot to Monday for tutoring scheduling
review.review_text: Before monday.com, we used HubSpot, which did not provide a good UI for non-sales users. Monday.com gave tutors a simpler front end and the team picked it up faster.

witness.excerpt_text: did not provide a good UI for non-sales users
